title: Nexus CreatePendingReviewRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/memory/pending-review. Called by the CLI at session-end capture. Optional fields (`world_id`, `task_kind`, `created_at`) default at runtime (`task_kind` → "unknown", `created_at` → current RFC 3339 timestamp); validation limits (pending_id/session_id/world_id ≤ 128, raw_digest ≤ 64KB, task_kind ≤ 64) stay handler-owned and are intentionally NOT encoded here (no behavior redesign).
